untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'climactic moves' and identification of 50% pullback from peak of climactic move. Standard indicators cannot measure multi-bar climax patterns or calculate pullback percentages from intra-move highs. Stochastic > 80 is not available (only stoch_k, stoch_d, stoch_k_5, stoch_d_5 without explicit threshold mapping). Confirmation of '2 bars of pullback stabilization' requires pattern recognition beyond simple indicator thresholds.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using RSI climax signals (>70/<30) and volatility elevation (ATR > historical vol). However, core logic requires pullback measurement from climax peak and multi-bar pattern confirmation which are not expressible with allowed indicators and operators. This signal is better suited for custom Python rules in backtest engine rather than JSON condition trees.
